titles.title: Oh Lord, Send the Power Just Now

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They were in an upper chamber, They were all with one accord, When the Holy Ghost descended As was promised by the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord, send the pow’r just now, Oh Lord, send the pow’r just now; Oh Lord, send the pow’r just now And baptize every one.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes, the pow’r from Heav’n descended With the sound of rushing wind; Tongues of fire came down upon them, As the Lord said He would send.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes, this old-time pow’r was given To our fathers who were true; This is promised to believers, And we all may have it too.
